items.title: This postseason, the Spurs have blown six double-digit leads, the most in a single playoff run in the play-by-play era (since 1997). The previous record was five, set by San Antonio in 2003.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
This postseason, the Spurs have blown six double-digit leads, the most in a single playoff run in the play-by-play era (since 1997). The previous record was five, set by San Antonio in 2003.

(via CrazyStats)
